notes: Crashes immediatly with only a black screen
title: Bulletstorm: Full Clip Edition

notes:
GPU = NVIDIA GTX 1050 Ti
launch options = -nostartupmovies
config files: StormPCCookedEngine.ini and StormEngine.ini
edit section:
[FullScreenMovie]
bForceNoMovies=TRUE

very rarely crashes ( when changing back to main menu )
title: Bulletstorm: Full Clip Edition

notes: Workaround: 1.) Launch parameter "-nostartupmovies" 2.) Edit config files StormPCCookedEngine.ini and StormEngine.ini in "/compatdata/501590/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/Bulletstorm Full Clip Edition/StormGame/Config/" 3.) Add in [FullScreenMovie] the line "bForceNoMovies=TRUE". With this the game works quite well on Proton with DXVK. But no movies!
title: Bulletstorm: Full Clip Edition

notes: Needs to disable movies (check other comments) and after that game is playable with Proton. Somehow sound does not work in-game, but works in-menu.
title: Bulletstorm: Full Clip Edition

notes: Seems to work with the fix to disable movies. Also have not been able to get sound to work correctly in-game.
